name: dispatched-past-budget-overdue
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'a dispatched past budget renders overdue with elapsed AND budget' case (S3.3): the liveness gradient renders overdue with both elapsed_seconds and budget_seconds, never a bare boolean cliff. The record carries its own budget, so this vector needs no shop-default injection (unlike the carved-out shop-default case). Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
